lore.story: Yu Zhong, the reincarnation of the Black Dragon, intends to unify the Cadia Riverlands through conquest and usher in an era of prosperity.

skill.name: Cursing Touch
skill.description: Yu Zhong applies <font color="a6aafb">Sha Residue</font> to enemy heroes every time he deals damage to them. <font color="a6aafb">Sha Residue</font> erupts upon reaching 5 stacks on a target. Then it begins consuming 1 stack every 0.4s to deal <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> equal to 20<font color="fba51f"> (+20% Extra Physical Attack)</font> plus 2.5% of the target's lost HP to the target. Each stack consumed restores 6% of Yu Zhong's lost HP. When <font color="a6aafb">Sha Residue</font> erupts, Yu Zhong also gains 30% Movement Speed for 3s.

skill.name: Dragon Tail
skill.description: Yu Zhong infuses his power into his cloak and turns it into a weapon, which starts to attack nearby enemies after a short delay. The inner area of the cloak deals 220<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, whereas the sharpened edge deals 275% damage and applies 2 stacks of <font color="a6aafb">Sha Residue</font>.

skill.name: Soul Grip
skill.description:
Yu Zhong unleashes the Dragon Soul, dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to all enemies in front and slowing them by 60% for 1s. 

Upon hitting an enemy, Yu Zhong's next Basic Attack will be enhanced, dealing 108<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. Upon hitting multiple enemies, the enhanced Basic Attack will apply multiple stacks of <font color="a6aafb">Sha Residue</font> and deal up to 200% damage.

skill.name: Furious Dive
skill.description:
Yu Zhong leaps towards the designated area with his full strength, dealing 180<font color="fba51f"> (+90% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He is able to dash one more time in the movement direction. 
After a short delay, enemies within the area of effect will be knocked airborne for 0.6s and take 180<font color="fba51f"> (+90% Extra Physical Attack)</font> additional <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill.name: Black Dragon Form
skill.description:
After channeling for 0.6s, Yu Zhong transforms into his Black Dragon Form. For up to 7s, he cannot use any skills but can move freely and will knock back enemy heroes in his path while dealing 180<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He also gains 1000<font color="fba51f"> (+200% Extra Physical Attack)</font> Max HP, becomes immune to control effects, and ignores obstacles in this form.
Upon exiting the Black Dragon Form, Yu Zhong enters <font color="a6aafb">Dragonoid Form</font>, gaining increased range on all of his skills for 10s.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, open with Yu Zhong's Ultimate and run into the enemy's formation while knocking them around. When the enemy's backline heroes are exposed, use his Ultimate again to enter Dragonoid Form, and unleash his combo starting with his 2nd Skill then 3rd Skill, then 1st Skill to deal tons of damage. Finally, use the enhanced Basic Attack from his 2nd Skill to finish off the enemy.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, use Yu Zhong's 2nd Skill to slow the enemy and leap on them using his 3rd Skill. When repositioning with the dash of his 3rd Skill, cast his 1st Skill to hit the enemy with the outer edge, and follow up with the enhanced Basic Attack from his 2nd Skill and finish the combo with a Sha Residue eruption.
